items.title: V DEADLINE TOMORROW: ROSEN, A GLOBALLY RECOGNIZED LAW FIRM, Encourages Visa Inc. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important January 21 Deadline in Securities Class Action First Filed by the Firm - V
items.author: N/A
items.description: Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, reminds Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) investors of the important January 21, 2025 lead plaintiff deadline in a securities class action lawsuit filed by the firm. The lawsuit alleges that Visa made materially false and/or misleading statements regarding its compliance with federal antitrust laws.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article indicates that Visa Inc. is facing a securities class action lawsuit alleging that the company made false and/or misleading statements regarding its compliance with federal antitrust laws, which suggests potential legal and financial issues for the company.
